tasks.title: Platform Architecture Baseline
tasks.description: Lock the PaaS architecture for AKS + Knative + Flux, including promotion model, naming conventions, and security boundaries.
todo: Document runtime contract for apps (port, probes, env vars, startup expectations)
Define environment model (preview, staging, production) and URL conventions
Define image tagging strategy (immutable sha tags + optional channel tags)
Define multi-tenant namespace and secret model
Define SLOs for reconcile latency, deployment readiness, and cold-start thresholds
tasks.notes: Documented AKS+Knative+Flux runtime contract, env and URL model, image tagging policy, tenant/secret boundaries, and baseline platform SLO targets.

tasks.title: Knative Foundation on AKS
tasks.description: Install and validate Knative Serving with ingress, TLS, autoscaling defaults, and domain mapping.
todo: Add Knative Serving manifests/helm wiring under packages/infra
Configure ingress path (Traefik or existing gateway) and domain mapping
Apply default autoscaling annotations (min 0, max 5, target 50, scale-down-delay 2m)
Create shared preview/staging secrets per app boundary
Verify wildcard DNS/TLS routing for Knative Services

tasks.title: CI Build and Push Stage
tasks.description: Add CI steps that build and push OCI images for changed apps, producing immutable metadata used by GitOps automation.
todo: Implement changed-app detection in CI scope
Build per-app Docker images with reproducible build args
Push immutable image tags (sha-shortsha) to registry
Attach OCI labels (commit SHA, source repo, build timestamp)
Export image metadata artifact for downstream deploy/automation steps

tasks.title: Flux Image Automation
tasks.description: Introduce Flux image scanning, policy selection, and automated manifest updates so image promotion does not require manual edits.
todo: Create ImageRepository resources for app registries
Create ImagePolicy resources for tag selection rules
Create ImageUpdateAutomation resources to patch manifests in git
Wire Kustomizations to consume updated manifests
Document rollback strategy (policy pin or git revert)

tasks.title: Webhook-Triggered Reconcile
tasks.description: Add a webhook path from CI to Flux Receiver so new image/manifests reconcile immediately instead of waiting for intervals.
todo: Create Flux Receiver and secret
Store receiver URL and secret in GitHub Actions secrets
Call webhook after image push and/or manifest commit
Add retry/backoff and non-blocking error handling
Emit logs/metrics for reconcile trigger success rate

tasks.title: Preview Environment Workflows
tasks.description: Implement PR preview creation/update/cleanup workflows built on the platform primitives.
todo: Create preview-pr workflow (detect, build/push, render, commit, trigger, report)
Create preview-cleanup workflow for PR close/merge
Create preview-gc workflow for TTL-based stale cleanup
Render manifests to packages/infra/manifests/previews/pr-<num>/
Post sticky PR comment with per-app preview URLs
tasks.notes: First product surface for the serverless PaaS.

tasks.title: Validation, Runbooks, and Onboarding
tasks.description: Prove reliability with scenario tests and publish docs for operating and onboarding services to the platform.
todo: Test single-app and multi-app preview lifecycle
Test branch slug edge cases and deterministic hostnames
Test re-push and image policy update behavior
Test PR close cleanup and scheduled TTL garbage collection
Write runbooks for failure modes (build fail, reconcile fail, cold-start regressions)
Write onboarding guide for adding a new app to the platform
